chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D- 1425 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of case For hearing of main case 03-10-2023 Mr. Badaruddin Memon, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioners, under instructions, does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
